description_long: This is a vibrant athletic shoe featuring a predominantly red upper with a textured knit pattern and black accent panels along the sides. The shoe has a white cushioned sole with a slightly raised heel and a black pull tab at the back for easy wearing. The brand name 'PUMA' is prominently displayed in white on the heel, while the iconic leaping puma logo appears on the side panel. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross red laces, and the interior appears padded for comfort. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments and active use. The materials suggest a combination of synthetic mesh, rubber, and foam for durability and support.
description: A red and black athletic shoe with a white sole, featuring PUMA branding and a modern, sporty design. The shoe has a textured knit upper, criss-cross laces, and a cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the white 'PUMA' branding on the heel, black pull tab, and red padded collar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black accent panel, leaping puma logo, and the overall streamlined shape.
description_view_2: Front angle displaying the red knit toe box, criss-cross lacing, and the shoe's rounded toe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible 'SOFTFOAM' branding on the sole and a clear look at the side panel and logo.
attribute_logo: White leaping puma on the side panel; large white 'PUMA' text on the heel.
